case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. TODD ROBERT CORREN 85790

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORREN, TODD ROBERT $10,755.05 PRINCIPAL, $637.37 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, $147.00 CLIENT SECURITY FUND PROCESSING FEE, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,839.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
